title: Persistent Memory
desc: Your AI remembers preferences, facts, and context across days, months, and years — not just one session.

title: WhatsApp AI
desc: Message your AI on WhatsApp like any contact. Full memory sync with Web and Android.

title: Android App
desc: Native Android app with push notifications, so your AI reaches you the same way your other apps do.

title: Calendar & Tasks
desc: An AI scheduler that reads your Google Calendar and manages your day around it.

title: Email Triage
desc: Automatically sort, summarize, and draft replies for your inbox.

title: Indian Languages
desc: Native support for Hindi, Malayalam, and Tamil, with more languages on the roadmap.

title: Voice-First Memory
desc: Speak to capture memories — instantly transcribed and stored with context.

title: Integrations
desc: Connect Gmail, Google Calendar, Notion, Slack, Telegram, GitHub, Jira, Trello, Cursor, and VS Code.

title: RAG & Vector Memory
desc: Semantic search over your personal knowledge graph, powered by pgvector.

title: Privacy & Self-Host
desc: Your data, your control. Run the full stack on your own hardware with Docker.

title: India-First
desc: Local languages, ₹ pricing, and data residency in AWS Mumbai (ap-south-1).

title: 8+ AI Providers
desc: Bring your own key for OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Mistral, Gemini, DeepSeek, NVIDIA NIM, or run local models via Ollama.
